noModels.title: No Models Loaded
noModels.description: You need to load a model before you can start chatting. Choose from your downloaded models below or download new ones.
noModels.signInPrompt: Sign in to sync your data and get started
noModels.signInDescription: Sign in to access AI models and simplify your setup
noModels.getStartedDescription: Choose and configure an AI model to start chatting
noModels.showAdvancedOptions: Or setup with your own API key / local model

messages.empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

tooltips.normalMode: Normal chat mode - Simple conversation without knowledge context
tooltips.knowledgeMode: Knowledge mode - Chat with access to your saved knowledge and context
tooltips.topicSelector: Select a topic to filter knowledge context
tooltips.newMessage: Start a new message thread in the current conversation

agentSettings.title: Agent Settings
agentSettings.subtitle: Configure agent behavior
agentSettings.systemPromptHint: Editing will override the default. Use {context} only when the selected graph supports knowledge context.
agentSettings.graphAgentDesc: Fully customizable agent with features you can enable or disable, such as knowledge retrieval and citations.
agentSettings.graphSimpleAgentDesc: Agent that can only be customized through tools, without additional feature toggles such as knowledge retrieval or citations.
agentSettings.contextRetrievalDesc: Retrieve relevant knowledge context before generating a response
agentSettings.contextPromptHint: Editing will override the default. {context} is appended at the bottom if missing.
agentSettings.agentNodeDesc: Tools available to the agent node when generating responses.
agentSettings.agentToolsDesc: Tools available to the agent node when generating responses.
agentSettings.legacyConfigDescription: This preset is still using the old config shape. Convert it to the unified flow config before saving so the runtime applies the same settings shown in the UI.
agentSettings.resetConfirm: This will reset all agent settings to their default values. Your current draft will be replaced.
